name: jdinkla-marketplace
description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by Joern Dinkla.

plugins.name: user-story-skills
plugins.description: 27 skills and slash commands for user story refinement across the full lifecycle — discovery, refinement, planning, QA, compliance, and post-release.

plugins.name: software-craft
plugins.description: Prompts for software architecture, DDD, ADRs, QA, and content processing: ADR create/refine/review, Kotlin arch review, DDD analysis, tech-debt & test audits, and markdown/X summarizers. 17 slash commands plus 2 skills.

plugins.name: first-factory
plugins.description: A software factory: drives a product idea from an empty directory to a built, tested, QA'd implementation through gated agent stages — discover, specify (PRD + BDD/Cucumber), scaffold, plan with independent review, backlog-driven build loop, and final QA. Ships a verified Kotlin + Cucumber stack template.

plugins.name: demo-factory
plugins.description: A demo studio: builds visual idea demos (three.js / WebGL, one self-contained HTML page) through an iterate-and-judge pipeline — brief with a shot list as definition of done, scaffold with a deterministic observation harness and headless Playwright capture, then a build → shoot → judge → refine loop where an independent vision agent critiques the rendered screenshots, capped rounds, human feel check at the end. Sibling of first-factory for exploratory visual work.
